home.headline: Turn messy notes into finished work
home.subheadline: Upload handwritten notes, PDFs, voice memos, or plain text. Choose your output type and let AI compile everything into a structured, publish-ready document — with every paragraph traced back to its source.
home.cardStudyDesc: Structured summaries from lecture notes and readings
home.cardBriefDesc: Concise business documents from research and data
home.cardReportDesc: Full reports compiled from multiple source files

auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

compile.title: Compile
compile.subtitle: Upload your notes, choose an output type, and let AI do the rest.

intent.studyDesc: Turns notes into study guides, summaries, and exam prep materials
intent.businessDesc: Converts research into reports, proposals, and executive briefs
intent.bookDesc: Structures notes into chapters, outlines, and manuscript drafts
intent.contentDesc: Transforms ideas into blog posts, scripts, and course outlines

fileUploader.browseHint: or click to browse — PDF, images, text, audio · max 10MB each

messyNotes.title: Messy Notes Mode
messyNotes.description: Restructures bullet fragments and incomplete sentences before compiling
